note: The daily task writes one queue file per day. fetch_transcripts.py reads files matching YYYY-MM-DD.json, pulls transcripts via the API, and sets each item's status to 'done'.

videos.title: Revealing Winning Amazon Online Arbitrage Product Examples (FULL BREAKDOWN)
videos.why: Under-represented angle in the corpus: concrete worked examples of winning products (the 'what to look for' axis) rather than another sourcing-method walkthrough. Capture the specific gate values / Keepa reads they use to call a product a winner.

videos.title: The New FASTEST Online Arbitrage Product Sourcing Method | SellerAmp QVS
videos.why: SellerAmp QVS (Quick View Source) deep-dive - a specific tool workflow only lightly covered so far. Check whether it adds concrete QVS settings/thresholds beyond the SAS material already staged (rHCB-vSCWcI, SAS masterguide).

videos.title: The BEST Online Arbitrage Sourcing Method For Beginners (2026)
videos.why: Published Mar 19 2026. Beginner-focused sourcing method; verify on ingest whether it adds a concrete technique vs the storefront-stalking / Keepa-PF / reverse-sourcing playbook already deep in the corpus, or is a 101 rehash (drop if duplicative).
